allow: PowerShell(python -c "import pkgutil, mediapipe; [print\(m.name\) for m in pkgutil.walk_packages\(mediapipe.__path__, mediapipe.__name__+'.'\)]" 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\awsom\\rt-mbas; $proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m streamlit run dashboard/app.py --server.headless true --server.port 8502" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\); Write-Host "Streamlit started OK \(killed after 8s\)" } else { Write-Host "Streamlit exited early with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" } 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\awsom\\rt-mbas; $proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "app/main.py" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\); Write-Host "app/main.py ran for 12s OK" } else { Write-Host "app/main.py exited early with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })
